free_text: 201 MeV Proton Excitation of Giant Resonances in
A 20 Mg/Cm**2 Pb-208 Thick Target,Enriched to Better
.The Scattered Protons are Detected Near the
Image Plane of the Spectrometer by Two Multiwire
.A Plastic Scintillator are Used As Triggers
Isovector Giant Dipole Resonance + Isoscalar  Giant
Isovector  Giant Quadrupole Resonance + Isoscalar Giant
